scripts.test:no-positive-conclusion-decisioning: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const out = execSync('npx rg positiveConclusionAllowed --glob=*.js --glob=!*output-gating.js --glob=!*build-canonical-state.js --glob=!*node_modules* utils/', { encoding: 'utf8', stdio: ['pipe','pipe','pipe'] }).toString(); const lines = out.split('\n').filter(l => /if\s*\(|\?|&&|\|\|/.test(l) && !/deprecated|_deprecated/.test(l)); if(lines.length > 0) { console.error('FAIL: positiveConclusionAllowed used in decisioning:', lines); process.exit(1); } console.log('PASS: no decisioning usage of positiveConclusionAllowed found');"
